description:
Implement Fallback Image Handling for News Item Thumbnails

Ensure all news items display a fallback placeholder image when the primary image is missing, broken, or fails to load on news pages.

Requirements:
- Detect when a news item's main image is unavailable (404, null, undefined, or failed to load)
- Display a default fallback image in place of missing images
- Maintain consistent aspect ratio and dimensions between actual and fallback images
- Apply fallback logic to all news listing pages and detail views
- Consider adding a generic news-related placeholder image if one doesn't exist
- Handle edge cases: slow-loading images, network timeouts, CORS errors
- Ensure fallback works for both initial render and runtime errors
- Test with news items that have: no image URL, invalid URLs, and broken image links
title: Implement fallback images for missing news thumbnails
